item.title: Welcome! 👋
item.description: This is my Second Brain1 - a place where I document and share my ideas, learnings, and explorations. Here you’ll find a collection of interconnected thoughts and resources that grow and evolve over time.

item.title: 1. Fork Quartz
item.description: Required Previous Steps Setup Gitea Create Organization to hold Vault and Quartz repo’s Create Gite EA Runner Key Decisions: Opted for non-mirror to allow customizations Action ...

item.title: 2. Setup Github Mirror
item.description: Create Github Authorization Token In a browser navigate to github.com Navigate to Settings menus: Settings (Under menu opened from user icon in top right) Developer Settings Personal ...

item.title: 3. Setup Cloudflare
item.description: Cloudflare DNS Setup: Log into Cloudflare Select your domain Add a new DNS record: Type: CNAME Name: www (or your preferred subdomain) Target: username.github.io Proxy status: ...

item.title: LLM Prompt Development
item.description: LLM HomeAssistant Background Home assistant recently released the home assistant release preview edition which is open source hardware specifically gear for development of a ...
